title: Readd ffjson for container and pod structs
body: We removed this awhile back because it was causing segfaults. We've added a few new fields to the DB since then, and the segfaults seem gone. Hooray?

comments.body: Nevermind. Seems to run fine locally, but still seing segfaults on papr.
I know what the issue is here, and it doesn't seem easily fixable. Closing this as such.
